key_facts: The document features a technical drawing of the Rheonics SRV-SLP Slimline Probe SRV.
The SRV-SLP probe has a maximum pressure rating of 500 bar (7500 psi).
The material used for the SRV-SLP probe is 316L.
The minimum insertion length for the probe is 80 mm (3.15 inches).
A customer-specified flange with a minimum outer diameter of 22 mm is required.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The document is a preliminary release (2310) and is intended for guidance only.
Rheonics holds US and International patents for its products.

chunks.page_summary: This page details the order codes, configuration options, and dimensional drawings for Rheonics' Slimline Probe (SLP) sensors, including viscometer and density meter variants.
product_names: Rheonics SRD density meter and viscometer

key_facts: The Slimline Probe (SLP) order code follows the format Rheonics SRx-SLP-Ayyy-Bzzz.
Customers must specify the sensor type, insertion length, and process connection required for their SLP probe.
Available sensor types for the Slimline Probe are Rheonics SRV viscometer and Rheonics SRD density meter and viscometer.
The minimum insertion length for the SLP probes is 80mm (3.15 inches).
If a welded flange connection is chosen, it must have a minimum outer diameter of 22mm.
The document includes dimensional drawings for two specific configurations: SRV-SLP-A83-B34N with a 3/4"-14 NPT thread, and SRD-SLP-A110-B10T with a DN20 Tri-Clamp.
The document is a preliminary release and is intended only for guidance.
warnings_notes: Client should specify sensor type, length variant and process connection required
This drawing remains property of rheonics. It may be neither copied nor informed to third persons or competitors without our approval. ( 2 paragraph 1 fig.7 copyright act of 9th Sept. 1965)
